document.title: Work By 5aitec
document.description: Empowering Your Business with Next-Generation Interactive 3D and AI Solutions. Based in Sweden and Working with Brands and Agencies Worldwide.

hero.title: Sai. A scratch chasing the acorn. Builder & investor in deep-tech
hero.subtitle: Scroll to Inspect Our Closed Deals

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.description: Browse our project carousel to explore our selected work.

items.title: eHealth Arena
items.subtitle: 3D Showroom
items.description: We created an interactive 3D platform that explores how the latest e-health solutions work in practice. From the patient's home to hospital environments and care providers' workplaces. Users can follow real care journeys, and understand how it all connects to create safer, more efficient care.

items.title: Select Concept
items.subtitle: 3D Interior Designer
items.description: Select Concept is a Swedish brand offering high-quality products for restaurants, hotels and cafes. We teamed up with them to conceptualize, design, and develop a user-friendly yet powerful 3D product planning tool, along with a new website.

items.title: Gamily
items.subtitle: Campaign Website
items.description: Gamily is the dating and friend app designed for gamers who are looking for meaningful relationships with fellow gamers.

items.title: Alamance Foods
items.subtitle: Website
items.description: Alamance Foods make fun foods. We made their web page using creative design ideas complemented with their products in 3D.

items.title: Norrkopings Symfoniorkester
items.subtitle: Website
items.description: We manage the entire web platform for Scenkonst Ost where Norrkoping Symphony Orchestra is a part. The audience can browse concerts, book tickets, buy gift cards and much more.

items.title: Glasbolaget
items.subtitle: 3D Configurator
items.description: We made a configurator for a company that sells glass in different forms. The user can create their own glass rails, walls and separate pieces using our 3D configurator. The prices are being fetched from an API so that we can calculate the total cost as the user designs.

items.title: SPP Dream Generator
items.subtitle: AI Image and Video Generator
items.description: What was supposed to be a one shot PR event became a lasting piece of the SPP website. The visitor takes a photo of him/herself and writes a short description of what the days would look like when retired from work.

items.title: ICA-nissen
items.subtitle: AR Game
items.description: ICA is one of Sweden's largest grocery stores. For Christmas 2024 we made an AR game for them where users could scan ICA's products and unlock features in the game.

items.title: Norrkopings Hamn
items.subtitle: 3D Flow Visualization
items.description: We created a real-time 3D visual experience detailing the physical journey and logistics of two shipping containers. The objective of this application was to provide users with a detailed and engaging insight into the complex operations conducted at the docks of Norrkoping.

items.title: HEIP
items.subtitle: 3D Visualisation
items.description: This visualization was created for Handelo Eco-Industrial Park and shows how different factories and units exchange by-products, reducing waste and maximizing overall efficiency.

items.title: Design is Funny
items.subtitle: Portfolio
items.description: Funny is the design work of Daniele Buffa, a Roman designer now based in London, UK. Buffa from the Italian means funny, comic, or droll.

about.title: Making Deep-Tech Real, One Improbable Bet at a Time

intro.title: Making Deep-Tech Real, One Improbable Bet at a Time
columns: i've got about 10 years of staying in the game. building early-stage startups. making things that are worth making. stanford gsb, 2025. est. 2015.
mildly opinionated about most things. moderately opinionated about Spatial Computing. deeply opinionated about dosas. founded 15 ventures. one exit to walmart.
i build and invest in deep-tech. the wild bets. the blurry line between improbable and impossible. not just writing cheques — zero to one, hands in the code.

whatWeBuild.title: What We Build
paragraphs: We build storytelling platforms that demand attention and reward curiosity. We push digital mediums to places you haven't seen before, and have fun doing it. Beyond code, we offer 3D design and animation, UI and motion design, concepts and digital strategy, full-stack development, and creative consulting.

Whether it's prototyping an idea, launching an augmented reality experience, or bringing high-fidelity visuals to life, Shader bridges the gap between creative ambition and technical execution. Our process is hands-on, collaborative, and tailored for teams that value both craft and innovation. We combine technical expertise with a designer's eye, ensuring that every interaction feels natural and every pixel is perfectly placed. We're not your regular IT department. We don't troubleshoot printers.

clients.title: Clients and Results
clients.paragraph: We have had the benefit of working with a large pool of great clients throughout the years. Our partnerships ranges from some of the most recognizable Swedish brands to international innovators.

serious.title: Serious About the Future
serious.paragraph: In today's fast-paced corporate landscape, you need a partner who understands the bottom line. At Shader, we engineer success through strategic alliances and mutual profitability. Our team is ready to synergize with your organization, unlock new verticals, and maximize your digital ROI. We don't just close deals; we deliver results that compound.
